extracted_rules.class_0: R1: The minimum value of the series occurs before time index 30.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: The minimum value of the series occurs at or after time index 30.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: The minimum value of the series occurs early (within roughly the first third of the time axis).
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: The minimum value of the series occurs late (within roughly the last third of the time axis).

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: The series stays mostly around a mid-level (roughly 0.35–0.55) without any very long, monotonic upward or downward trend from start to end.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: The series shows an overall large downward trend from the beginning to around the middle (values drop from about 0.7–0.8 down to near 0.1–0.2), followed by a partial recovery toward the end.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: The series has at least one very low dip (value below 0.15) occurring in the first half of the time axis.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: The series has its lowest very deep dip (value below 0.15) occurring in the second half of the time axis.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: Time series with at least one very sharp, narrow spike to a high value (around 0.8–1.0) followed almost immediately by a steep drop to a low value (around 0.1–0.2), typically occurring in the first half of the series.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: Time series that start relatively high (around 0.6–0.8) and then show an overall downward trend into lower values (around 0.1–0.3) during the first half of the series, without an isolated, extremely sharp spike–drop pattern.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: The minimum value in the series occurs early (within roughly the first 40% of the time) and the series then recovers to moderate/high values later.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: The minimum value in the series occurs late (within roughly the last 40% of the time), following an initially moderate or high level.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: In the first 15–20% of the series, there is a pronounced spike (local maximum) reaching close to the global maximum, after which the values quickly drop to a low valley before stabilizing to mid‑range values.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: The series starts relatively high and then steadily decreases during the first 15–20% of the series, without an early isolated spike; any major spike occurs only later, after this initial downward trend.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: In the middle part of the series (roughly indices 25–45), values tend to stay in a moderate band around 0.4–0.6 without any very deep dip (they do not fall below about 0.2 in that segment).
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: In the middle part of the series (roughly indices 25–45), there is a pronounced deep dip where values fall close to the minimum of the series (around or below 0.2) before rising again.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: The series has at least one very sharp and deep drop (local minimum) below 0.1 occurring between time 5 and time 20.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: The series has a pronounced and sustained low segment (values below 0.2) occurring later in time, roughly between time 45 and time 60.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: The series has its highest peak very early (within roughly the first 10% of the time), and then stays in a moderate range without any large late peak that clearly exceeds that early maximum.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: The series starts high or moderate, decreases, and then has its main (or a comparable) peak much later (around the middle of the time axis), i.e., the dominant peak occurs noticeably after the initial segment.
